# Frozen held-out seed (do not edit, do not run on)

Pristine byte-for-byte snapshot of `worlds/heldout/` (the Beacon held-out world)
taken at blind-authoring time. It exists only as a tamper / drift reference:
diff `worlds/heldout` against this at conclusion to prove the held-out world was
never tuned during the tournament. The tournament runs on `worlds/heldout`
(hermetic scratch per trial); this copy is never executed and never inspected
for tuning. Read-only.
